title: langgenius/dify
summary: Dify 是一个开源平台，用于构建基于LLM的Agent工作流和RAG管道。它支持丰富的AI模型和工具，提供低代码/无代码界面，可部署在云、VPC或自托管环境。项目拥有近15万星标，涵盖agent、RAG、工作流编排等核心功能，适合团队快速从原型到生产。
summary_en: Dify is an open-source platform for building LLM-based Agent workflows and RAG pipelines. It supports rich AI models and tools, offers a low-code/no-code interface, and can be deployed on cloud, VPC, or self-hosted. With nearly 150k stars, it covers agent, RAG, workflow orchestration, enabling teams to move from prototype to production quickly.
